scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/shared build && pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/codegen build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/shared build && pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/codegen build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.smoke:internal-beta: pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/shared build && pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/codegen build && tsx src/smokeInternalBeta.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/shared build && pnpm --filter @atoms-cp/codegen build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
